name: io.github.ziggythebot/namecheap
description: Check domain availability across 600+ TLDs on Namecheap with pricing and purchase links

environmentVariables.description: Your Namecheap API key from Profile → Tools → API Access
environmentVariables.name: NAMECHEAP_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Your Namecheap account username (same as API_USER)
environmentVariables.name: NAMECHEAP_USERNAME

environmentVariables.description: Your whitelisted IP address (get with: curl -s https://api.ipify.org)
environmentVariables.name: NAMECHEAP_CLIENT_IP
